name: add-core-shadcn-components
description: Add Card, Input, Label, Badge, and Separator components following shadcn/ui patterns. Use cva() for variants, cn() for class merging, Radix primitives where applicable.
acceptanceCriteria: Card component with CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription, CardContent, CardFooter exports
Input component with focus ring, disabled state styling
Badge component with default, secondary, destructive, outline variants
Separator component using @radix-ui/react-separator with horizontal/vertical orientation
All components use cn() utility and Tailwind classes only
